login.title: Sign in with the correct learning role
login.subtitle: Admins manage the system, teachers guide classes, and students learn lessons and take assessments. Each account gets only the permissions it needs.
login.formDesc: Admins and teachers sign in with the email/password provided by the system. Students can use Gmail to sign in or register.
login.studentDesc: Only students can self-register with Gmail.
login.googleStudentButton: Student sign in / register with Gmail
login.noStaffRegisterTitle: No public admin or teacher registration.
login.noStaffRegisterDesc: Teacher accounts are created and provided by an admin. Admin accounts are bootstrapped through a secure server script.
login.studentRegisterLink: Register as a student with Gmail
notes: Student self-registration always receives the student role.
Teachers do not use a public register form; admins create teacher accounts in the admin area.
Roles are stored in Firebase Auth custom claims and Firestore user profiles to protect both UI and data.

register.title: Create a student account with Gmail
register.subtitle: Students use Gmail to access the learning path, take tests, save progress, and receive suitable guidance.
register.formDesc: This form only creates student-role accounts. Admins and teachers do not register here.
register.groupHelp: Choose the group closest to you so the system can suggest more suitable content.
register.staffNoticeDesc: Teachers receive accounts from an admin. The first admin is created with a secure server script so admin privileges are never exposed on the frontend.
benefits: Save the learner profile and suitable learner group.
Ready to extend with lesson progress, quiz results, and code history.
Students cannot upgrade themselves to teacher or admin.

profile.subtitle: Your account information, role, and current access permissions.
profile.accountDesc: You can update personal information. Role and account status are managed only by the system/admin.
profile.name: Full name

roleAccessDesc.admin: You can manage users, create teacher accounts, and access teacher guides.
roleAccessDesc.teacher: You can access teacher guides, online/offline class plans, and teacher resources.
roleAccessDesc.student: You can study lessons, take quizzes, run code, and track learning progress.

unauthorized.title: You do not have permission to access this page
unauthorized.desc: Your current account does not have the required role. If you are a teacher or admin, contact an administrator to check your permissions.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.missingRole: This account has no assigned role. Please contact an admin.
errors.gmailRequired: Students must use a @gmail.com account to register.
errors.roleConflict: This email already has another role and cannot register as a student.
errors.popupClosed: You closed the Gmail sign-in window.
errors.emailNotVerified: Please use a verified Gmail account.
